scripts.build: pip3 install pygbag==0.9.3 --break-system-packages && python3 -m pygbag --disable-sound-format-error --build game && cd game/build/web && curl -L -O https://pygame-web.github.io/cdn/vtx.js && curl -L -O https://pygame-web.github.io/archives/0.9/browserfs.min.js && curl -L -O https://pygame-web.github.io/cdn/0.9.3/pythons.js && curl -L -O https://pygame-web.github.io/cdn/0.9.3/empty.html && cd ../../../ && sed -i 's|https://pygame-web.github.io/cdn/0.9.3/||g' game/build/web/index.html
